publishedAbstract: - When trying to install the CIFS/SMB CSI Operator on a RHOCP cluster where the Nutanix CSI Operator is already present, the following errors is fired: ~~~ The OperatorGroup in the openshift-cluster-csi-drivers Namespace does not support the global installation mode. Select a different installation Namespace that supports this mode. ~~~
publishedTitle: Nutanix CSI Operator prevents CIFS/SMB CSI Operator from being installed
